About Us
Why Work at Francis Plumbing Heating & Cooling

Francis Plumbing Heating & Cooling has been serving Cornwall and surrounding areas since 1933!

Our Mission is to build a better quality of life for our team, our customers and their families and our Vision is to be the best employer in our local community. We truly strive towards this and so do our employees. Being a locally owned and operated company serving our friends, neighbors and families is something we take great pride in.

At Francis Plumbing Heating & Cooling we strive to be the best we can each and everyday, and we are always looking to add likeminded, team players to grow with us.

People often come to us looking for a job. They stay with us because they find a fulfilling career.

Current Openings

Come join one of Ottawa’s longest standing Plumbing companies!

 

We are looking to grow our team with licenced plumbers.

Licenced 306A plumbers only… start up to $49/hr!

Send your resume to ianh@francisplumbing.com

What Else Do We Offer ?
Not only do we offer competitive pay, but we also offer the following extra’s to our employees:
Medical, Dental
and Vision Benefits:

Comprehensive healthcare coverage including medical, dental, and vision insurance to ensure employees and their families have access to quality medical care when needed.

Life In
